blocks.title: QQQ Key Metrics

dataContract.description: Current price, daily change, YTD return, and 52-week range for QQQ

blocks.sub_question: What are the current price, daily percentage change, year-to-date return, and 52-week high and low for the QQQ ETF?

blocks.title: QQQ Price Trend

dataContract.description: Historical daily closing prices of QQQ

blocks.sub_question: What is the daily closing price history of the QQQ ETF over the past year?

blocks.title: QQQ vs Benchmark

dataContract.description: Cumulative total return of QQQ compared to S&P 500

blocks.sub_question: How does the cumulative total return of the QQQ ETF compare to the S&P 500 benchmark over the past year?

blocks.title: Top Holdings

dataContract.description: List of largest QQQ holdings by market value

blocks.sub_question: What are the top 10 holdings within the QQQ ETF ranked by their market weight?

data.enriched_prompt: Retrieve the current market quote for the QQQ ETF, including price, daily change, YTD return, and 52‑week high/low. Pull the last 252 daily closing prices for QQQ and for the S&P 500 benchmark. Using the price series, calculate the YTD return for QQQ and generate cumulative total‑return series for both QQQ and the S&P 500 to plot on a comparative line chart. Also fetch the top 10 QQQ holdings with their market values for a bar‑list. Return all data ready for the KPI card, price trend chart, benchmark comparison chart, and holdings list.
data.analysis_type: Single ETF KPI and benchmark comparison dashboard
data.suggested_workflow: Step 1: Use financial_data__get_real_time_data to obtain QQQ's current price, daily change, YTD return, and 52‑week range. Step 2: Use financial_data__get_historical_data to pull 252 days of daily closing prices for QQQ and for the S&P 500 ticker. Step 3: Apply analytics_engine__calculate_annualized_return on the QQQ price series to derive YTD return and on both series to compute cumulative total‑return curves. Step 4: Use financial_data__get_fundamentals to retrieve QQQ holdings and select the top 10 by market value. Step 5: Package the KPI metrics, price series, cumulative return series, and holdings list for the dashboard blocks.
